tweet_text: 🚨 FIFA raises top ticket price for the World Cup final to $10,990, up from $1,600 in 2022! Fans faced glitches during the ticket sales reopening for the July 19 match at MetLife Stadium. 🎟️⚽ #WorldCup2026 #FIFATickets
article_title: Fifa raises top ticket price for World Cup final to $10,990, up from $1,600 in 2022

tweet_text: 🚨 Premier League panel backs referee's decision on controversial Man Utd penalty appeal after Amad was denied in their draw against Bournemouth. United's official complaint has been dismissed! ⚽️🤔 #ManUtd #PremierLeague
article_title: Premier League panel rule on controversial Man Utd penalty with official complaint lodged

tweet_text: 🚨 UEFA President Ceferin warns Italy it risks losing Euro 2032 due to poor stadium conditions, calling them "among the worst in Europe." Action needed ASAP! ⚽️🇮🇹 #Euro2032 #FootballInfrastructure
article_title: Uefa president Ceferin warns Italy it could lose Euro 2032 without action on stadiums

tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Gabriele Gravina resigns as head of the Italian FA and Gianluigi Buffon steps down from his national team role after Italy fails to qualify for a third consecutive World Cup! 🇮🇹⚽ #Italy #WorldCup
article_title: Italian FA head and Buffon quit over World Cup failure
